infoPlist.NSCameraUsageDescription: Slot Pro needs camera access to photograph jobs before and after completion.
infoPlist.NSMicrophoneUsageDescription: Slot Pro needs microphone access for customer video calls.
infoPlist.NSLocationWhenInUseUsageDescription: Slot Pro needs your location for job navigation and customer tracking.
infoPlist.NSLocationAlwaysUsageDescription: Slot Pro tracks your location in the background during active jobs.
infoPlist.NSPhotoLibraryUsageDescription: Slot Pro needs photo library access to upload job progress photos.
